name: saarwood-teleprompter
description: Scalable broadcast-grade teleprompter web application (PWA) — Basic / Professional / Expert tiers

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run build --workspace=packages/backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run test --workspace=packages/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=packages/frontend && npm run lint --workspace=packages/backend
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run build --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:dist:mac: npm run electron:build && npm run dist:mac --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:dist:win: npm run electron:build && npm run dist:win --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:dist:linux: npm run electron:build && npm run dist:linux --workspace=packages/electron
scripts.electron:dist:all: npm run electron:build && npm run dist:all --workspace=packages/electron
